'''Ruke Chowall''' was a [[Quarren/Legends|Quarren]] journalist who worked as the editor of the newsnet ''[[Bends]]'' during the last decades of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] stationed out of [[Morjanssik]] on [[Dac/Legends|Dac]]. He very publicly denounced [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Tundra Dowmeia/Legends|Tundra Dowmeia]], stating that the Senator was "a tool of both the Old Republic and the [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]]" who would sell out his people for a few credits.

==Appearances==
*{{InsiderCite|73|Republic HoloNet News Core Edition 15:01:13}} {{1st}}
